name: Carob Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chopped nuts or sunflower seeds (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour and baking soda.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the applesauce, honey, and vanilla extract.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the liquid ingredients.
4. Add carob chips and nuts (if desired) and mix well until combined.
5. Drop cookie dough by teaspoonfuls onto a non-stick or lightly oiled baking sheet.
6. Flatten each cookie with a fork.
7. Bake at 350°F for 13 minutes.
8. Makes 48 cookies.
Per cookie: 55 Calories; 1g protein; 0.9g fat; 12g carbohydrate; 0 cholesterol; 18mg sodium.
